name: Medium Ribbed Food Storage Canister - Threshold™
description:
Store cookies, flour and more within easy reach in the Medium Ribbed Food Storage Canister from Threshold™. This medium food storage canister features a ribbed design and includes a lid with a gold-tone knob handle for an elegant look and easy use. Made of stoneware, this canister makes a stylish and functional addition to any kitchen.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
